3322670.name: ヒバリでなくナイチンゲールでもなく
3322670.description:
We prove our void――『She sings, but she's not a skylark, not even a nightingale.』is a group mystery ADV featuring a story woven by two girls, played by Haruna Mikawa and Yui Ishikawa, with modern expressions such as Live2D and full voice.

■Features

・The main character is created using Live2D

Featuring expressive and immersive facial animations.By incorporating expressions and actions of joy, anger, sorrow, and pleasure through Live2D, the sense of realism in the story is enhanced.

・The main storyline features fully voiced dialogues

Voice actors such as Yui Ishikawa and Katsuki Mikawa bring the characters to life. This full voice implementation deepens the story and enhances player immersion.

・Passion for Music

The opening theme is performed by virtual singer "Ruri Enma." With over 30 original tracks, the music beautifully enhances every scene within the game.

■CAST

Akane Tochigi/Haruna Mikawa

Shizuku Yugiri/Yui Ishikawa

Tsukimi Harara/Saya Fukuzumi

Kusuha Misima/Rie Okamoto

Furu Eugenia Sangetsuan /Miho Koubai　

Shuu Yugiri/Kaoru Koga

Emiri Sakushima/Kanna Amasawa

■Synopsis

A cutting-edge visual novel with the latest in game expressions and immersive a Japan where theories written in academic papers become reality and universities hold power, a new story unfolds.Years after the "University Struggle," a conflict born from academic disputes, a student from Yomo University, Akane Tochinoki, becomes involved in the investigation of a series of assaults known as the "Scholar Killings."

During her investigation, she meets a mysterious girl named “Shizuku Yugiri.” This girl, who is both dignified and lonely, joins Akane in uncovering the truth behind the Scholar Killings.As they investigate together, their days flow vividly and brightly, like a river. This encounter is destined to become an unforgettable one…
3322670.supported_languages:
日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
